title: Festival Awakening
content: The harbor festival hums with lanterns and paper stalls. Aki wanders into a small shrine stall where Hana tends charms. The world smells of incense and fried food.

choices.text: Examine the city pamphlet on the charity table
Check Mira's live blog teaser pinned at a vendor stall

choices.notes: If skipped, guaranteed fallback will deliver equivalent charm evidence by Ch3.

meta.recommended_player_load: Introduce chronosense + 1 small inventory item; keep exposition light
